name: RYFT
description: RYFT is the composability (connective) layer for the new era of onchain value. RYFT enables RWAs, AI, tokens, and NFTs to be transformed into interconnected systems of liquidity, utility, and engagement. Rather than remaining static, assets can evolve, integrate, and compound through composable onchain mechanics. Built to innovate and expand over the long term, RYFT’s mission is to make every asset alive, liquid, co-creative, and composable, setting a new standard for how value is created and coordinated across onchain ecosystems. Status: Beta MVP live Architecture: Multi-chain
